problem_solved: Healthcare providers face documentation burden that consumes hours daily, contributing to burnout and reducing time for patient care
solution_description: AI-powered ambient scribe that captures patient encounters and generates structured clinical notes in seconds. Offers dictation mode, customizable note templates, and EHR integrations. 55% of users save at least 1 hour in documentation time
traction_signals: 55% of users saved at least 1 hour in documentation time
27% reduction in burnout reported by users
notes: Strong European presence with French headquarters. Fast processing latency (2-3x faster than competitors). Well-suited for multi-problem encounters. Growing US presence
